titleStmt.title: SII 27.78: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 78. (A.R. No. 486 of 1928-29.) CHĀNTĀU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa-svāmin temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1[3]25, Svabhānu, Phālguṇa śu. 1, Sunday. The tithi corresponds to 1404 A.D., February 12 when the weekday was Tuesday.

It states that Śaṅkarāraṇya-śrīpāda, disciple of Vidyāraṇya-śrīpāda obtained a gift of land from Kuṁjūraṇṇa-uḷḷūra, Jātaṇṇa-upādhya, and Īśvara-uḷḷūra, and made it over to the temple of Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa, of Niḍuvaṁpaḷḷi, in the village of Brahmūru when Mahābaḷadēva-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁnamaḥ namastuṁga śira
ścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
vē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa
1325 svabhānu saṁvacharada phā
lguṇa su 1 Ā daṁdu śrīmanmahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra harihara ma
hārāyara vijayarājyādbhyu da
yadalu mahābaḷadēva Oḍeyaru bā
rakūra rājyavanu pālisuvalli brahmo
ra grāmada niḍuvaṁpaḷḷiya Adhivāsada
Ahitāgni dēvālyada śaṁkara nārāya
ṇa dēvara sthānavanū kuṁjuraṁṇa Ūḷḷū
ranu jātaṁṇa Upādhya Iśvara Ūḷḷūra
na kayyalu śrī vidyāraṁṇya śrīpādaṁ
gaḷa siṣyaru śaṁkarāraṇya śrīpādaṁ
gaḷu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍa bāḷa ca
tu ssīmeya mūḍalu Iśvara Ū
ḷḷūra paṁḍitanagaḍiIṁ paḍuvalu teṁ
kalu paṁḍitanu nārāyaṇa Ūḷḷūra
na gaḍiIṁ baḍagalu paḍavalu haṁdā
ḍiya taṇṇaṁje tōṭaṁ mūḍalu ba
ḍagalu jātaṁṇṇa nāraṇa Uḷḷūrana gaḍi
Iṁ teṁkalu yiṁti catussīme yoḷa
guḷa bāḷiṁda dēvara Amrutapaḍige biṭṭa
batta hāne 40 li mūḍi 24 śaṁkara he
bāru tana brahmadāyada mūlada bā
ḷiṁ naḍava yeṁṇe teṁgu 36 jātaṁ
ṇṇanu ṁtā ṁge 1 2 ka
dēvara Amrutapaḍige bha
yaṁ bhatta mūḍe 23
Amrutapaḍige Aṟu
dinaṁprati tappade
Eṁṭu mūḍe The
Digital edition of SII 27.78 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
